target_name: SolaceAGI CI Oracle — Does cloudbuild.yaml run tests before deploy? (Kent Beck)
context: Kent Beck TDD oracle (q-agi-040): What tests run in CI before every deploy? Review cloudbuild.yaml — are there test steps before the deploy step? If not, we are shipping without a safety net. Every critical path should be tested in CI. Kent Beck: 'If it's not tested in CI, it's not done.'
